ext.description: Read workspace TODO.md and show tasks in a sidebar tree view.
activitybar.title: Todo
welcome.noFile:
No TODO.md found in workspace root.
[Create TODO.md](command:todoMd.createFile)
cmd.refresh.title: Todo: Refresh
cmd.openFile.title: Todo: Open TODO.md
cmd.openSettings.title: Todo: Open Settings
cmd.createFile.title: Todo: Create TODO.md
cmd.reveal.title: Todo: Reveal Item
cmd.toggle.title: Todo: Toggle Checkbox
cmd.reopen.title: Todo: Reopen Item
config.title: Todo (Markdown)
config.file.description: Relative path from workspace folder. Supports ${workspaceFolder} and ${workspaceFolder:name}.
config.collapsedSections.description: Section titles (case-insensitive substring match) collapsed by default.
config.maxFileSizeKb.description: Skip parsing if TODO.md exceeds this size (KB).
config.showDoneDescription.description: Show 'done' suffix on completed items in the tree.
config.hideEmptyGroups.description: When to hide group headers in the tree.
config.hideEmptyGroups.never: Always show all group headers, even empty ones.
config.hideEmptyGroups.noItems: Hide group headers that have no checkbox items under them (default).
config.hideEmptyGroups.noPending: Also hide group headers whose items are all completed (no pending items).
